name: Carolyn Mendoza
title: Assistant Vice President of Sales
tagline: Your Trusted Partner in Smart Real Estate Decisions
bioParagraphs: Carolyn Mendoza serves as Assistant Vice President of Sales at Vista Land International Premier, where she helps Filipino families, OFWs, and first-time investors find the right pre-selling home across Vista Land's trusted brands.
Her focus is on making the buying process clear and pressure-free — walking clients through reservation, financing options, and turnover timelines so they know exactly what to expect at every stage.

Whether it's a house-and-lot community for a growing family or a condo unit for a young professional starting out, Carolyn takes the time to match clients with a development and payment plan that actually fits their budget and goals.
